title: rubus flaviramus
intro: Rubus flaviramus, also known as yellow raspberry or yellow raspberry vine, is a type of thorny, woody vine that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus flaviramus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus flaviramus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make jams, jellies, and other food products.
